seoTitle: Sargood vs Sassafras — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sargood and Sassafras. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sargood and Sassafras.
heading: Sargood vs Sassafras — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sargood, Victoria and Sassafras, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sassafras has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Sargood (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sargood or Sassafras safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sargood has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Sassafras scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sargood scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Sassafras scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sargood or Sassafras?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sassafras has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
